head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Mostly fine. Isolated showers, mainly about Coromandel Peninsula and north of Auckland City.
Waikato to Whanganui including Bay of Plenty and the central high country, also Gisborne to Wairarapa
Generally fine. Isolated showers about Waikato and Waitomo this afternoon.
Mostly cloudy. Isolated showers developing from Kapiti northwards this morning.
Isolated showers, turning to rain in Westland and Grey for a time this afternoon or evening.
A period of rain in Southland and Otago this afternoon or evening, and showers in Canterbury tonight, otherwise fine.
Showers turning to rain this morning, with heavy falls, clearing in the evening.

North Island: A few showers in the east and north. Becoming fine elsewhere, with isolated showers clearing.
South Island: Showers clearing for most and fine spells increasing, but late showers possible for Grey.

North Island: A few light showers about Northland and Gisborne. Mostly fine elsewhere.
South Island: A few showers about the Fiords. Generally fine elsewhere, but partly cloudy with a possible shower for Westland and Buller.

North Island: A few light showers about Northland. Mostly fine elsewhere.
South Island: Showers in Fiordland and Stewart Island. Generally fine elsewhere, but partly cloudy with a possible late shower about coastal Southland.
Showers during Thursday morning, then mainly fine. Northwesterlies turning strong southwest early Thursday, then lighter southerly late Thursday. Winds tending westerly on Saturday.

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
